seoTitle: Harrow vs Harston — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Harrow and Harston. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Harrow and Harston.
heading: Harrow vs Harston — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Harrow, Victoria and Harston, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Harston has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Harrow (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Harrow or Harston safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Harrow has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Harston scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Harrow scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Harston scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Harrow or Harston?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Harston has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
